list.name: Medical Events
list.rawQuery: SELECT date::timestamptz as time, end_date::timestamptz as timeend, title as text, category || ' — ' || COALESCE(subcategory, '') || ': ' || COALESCE(description,'') as tags FROM events WHERE $__timeFilter(date::timestamptz) ORDER BY date

description: Compact lab results overview — 106 biomarkers with inline sparkline trends.

links.title: Health Timeline (detailed)
links.tooltip: Open the full health timeline dashboard

targets.rawSql:
SELECT s.time,
    MAX(s.value) FILTER (WHERE s.metric = 'WBC') AS "WBC",
    MAX(s.value) FILTER (WHERE s.metric = 'RBC') AS "RBC",
    MAX(s.value) FILTER (WHERE s.metric = 'Hemoglobin') AS "Hemoglobin",
    MAX(s.value) FILTER (WHERE s.metric = 'Hematocrit') AS "Hematocrit",
    MAX(s.value) FILTER (WHERE s.metric = 'Platelets') AS "Platelets",
    MAX(s.value) FILTER (WHERE s.metric = 'MCV') AS "MCV",
    MAX(s.value) FILTER (WHERE s.metric = 'MCH') AS "MCH",
    MAX(s.value) FILTER (WHERE s.metric = 'MCHC') AS "MCHC",
    MAX(s.value) FILTER (WHERE s.metric = 'RDW') AS "RDW",
    MAX(s.value) FILTER (WHERE s.metric = 'MPV') AS "MPV"
FROM samples s
WHERE s.metric IN ('WBC', 'RBC', 'Hemoglobin', 'Hematocrit', 'Platelets', 'MCV', 'MCH', 'MCHC', 'RDW', 'MPV')
  AND $__timeFilter(s.time)
  AND s.value IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY s.time
ORDER BY s.time

SELECT s.time,
    MAX(s.value) FILTER (WHERE s.metric = 'Abs Neutrophils') AS "Abs Neutrophils",
    MAX(s.value) FILTER (WHERE s.metric = 'Abs Lymphocytes') AS "Abs Lymphocytes",
    MAX(s.value) FILTER (WHERE s.metric = 'Abs Monocytes') AS "Abs Monocytes",
    MAX(s.value) FILTER (WHERE s.metric = 'Abs Eosinophils') AS "Abs Eosinophils",
    MAX(s.value) FILTER (WHERE s.metric = 'Abs Basophils') AS "Abs Basophils",
    MAX(s.value) FILTER (WHERE s.metric = 'Abs Immature Granulocytes') AS "Abs Immature Granulocytes"
FROM samples s
WHERE s.metric IN ('Abs Neutrophils', 'Abs Lymphocytes', 'Abs Monocytes', 'Abs Eosinophils', 'Abs Basophils', 'Abs Immature Granulocytes')
  AND $__timeFilter(s.time)
  AND s.value IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY s.time
ORDER BY s.time

SELECT s.time,
    MAX(s.value) FILTER (WHERE s.metric = 'Neutrophils %') AS "Neutrophils %",
    MAX(s.value) FILTER (WHERE s.metric = 'Lymphocytes %') AS "Lymphocytes %",
    MAX(s.value) FILTER (WHERE s.metric = 'Monocytes %') AS "Monocytes %",
    MAX(s.value) FILTER (WHERE s.metric = 'Eosinophils %') AS "Eosinophils %",
    MAX(s.value) FILTER (WHERE s.metric = 'Basophils %') AS "Basophils %",
    MAX(s.value) FILTER (WHERE s.metric = 'Immature Granulocytes %') AS "Immature Granulocytes %"
FROM samples s
WHERE s.metric IN ('Neutrophils %', 'Lymphocytes %', 'Monocytes %', 'Eosinophils %', 'Basophils %', 'Immature Granulocytes %')
  AND $__timeFilter(s.time)
  AND s.value IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY s.time
ORDER BY s.time

SELECT s.time,
    MAX(s.value) FILTER (WHERE s.metric = 'Glucose') AS "Glucose",
    MAX(s.value) FILTER (WHERE s.metric = 'BUN') AS "BUN",
    MAX(s.value) FILTER (WHERE s.metric = 'Creatinine') AS "Creatinine",
    MAX(s.value) FILTER (WHERE s.metric = 'eGFR') AS "eGFR",
    MAX(s.value) FILTER (WHERE s.metric = 'Sodium') AS "Sodium",
    MAX(s.value) FILTER (WHERE s.metric = 'Potassium') AS "Potassium",
    MAX(s.value) FILTER (WHERE s.metric = 'Chloride') AS "Chloride",
    MAX(s.value) FILTER (WHERE s.metric = 'CO2') AS "CO2",
    MAX(s.value) FILTER (WHERE s.metric = 'Calcium') AS "Calcium",
    MAX(s.value) FILTER (WHERE s.metric = 'Anion Gap') AS "Anion Gap"
FROM samples s
WHERE s.metric IN ('Glucose', 'BUN', 'Creatinine', 'eGFR', 'Sodium', 'Potassium', 'Chloride', 'CO2', 'Calcium', 'Anion Gap')
  AND $__timeFilter(s.time)
  AND s.value IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY s.time
ORDER BY s.time

SELECT s.time,
    MAX(s.value) FILTER (WHERE s.metric = 'ALT') AS "ALT",
    MAX(s.value) FILTER (WHERE s.metric = 'AST') AS "AST",
    MAX(s.value) FILTER (WHERE s.metric = 'Alk Phos') AS "Alk Phos",
    MAX(s.value) FILTER (WHERE s.metric = 'Total Bilirubin') AS "Total Bilirubin",
    MAX(s.value) FILTER (WHERE s.metric = 'Direct Bilirubin') AS "Direct Bilirubin",
    MAX(s.value) FILTER (WHERE s.metric = 'GGT') AS "GGT",
    MAX(s.value) FILTER (WHERE s.metric = 'Albumin') AS "Albumin",
    MAX(s.value) FILTER (WHERE s.metric = 'Total Protein') AS "Total Protein",
    MAX(s.value) FILTER (WHERE s.metric = 'Globulin') AS "Globulin",
    MAX(s.value) FILTER (WHERE s.metric = 'A/G Ratio') AS "A/G Ratio"
FROM samples s
WHERE s.metric IN ('ALT', 'AST', 'Alk Phos', 'Total Bilirubin', 'Direct Bilirubin', 'GGT', 'Albumin', 'Total Protein', 'Globulin', 'A/G Ratio')
  AND $__timeFilter(s.time)
  AND s.value IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY s.time
ORDER BY s.time

SELECT s.time,
    MAX(s.value) FILTER (WHERE s.metric = 'Total Cholesterol') AS "Total Cholesterol",
    MAX(s.value) FILTER (WHERE s.metric = 'HDL Cholesterol') AS "HDL Cholesterol",
    MAX(s.value) FILTER (WHERE s.metric = 'LDL Cholesterol') AS "LDL Cholesterol",
    MAX(s.value) FILTER (WHERE s.metric = 'Triglycerides') AS "Triglycerides",
    MAX(s.value) FILTER (WHERE s.metric = 'Non-HDL Cholesterol') AS "Non-HDL Cholesterol",
    MAX(s.value) FILTER (WHERE s.metric = 'Apolipoprotein B') AS "Apolipoprotein B",
    MAX(s.value) FILTER (WHERE s.metric = 'Cholesterol/HDL Ratio') AS "Cholesterol/HDL Ratio"
FROM samples s
WHERE s.metric IN ('Total Cholesterol', 'HDL Cholesterol', 'LDL Cholesterol', 'Triglycerides', 'Non-HDL Cholesterol', 'Apolipoprotein B', 'Cholesterol/HDL Ratio')
  AND $__timeFilter(s.time)
  AND s.value IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY s.time
ORDER BY s.time

SELECT s.time,
    MAX(s.value) FILTER (WHERE s.metric = 'TSH') AS "TSH",
    MAX(s.value) FILTER (WHERE s.metric = 'Free T4') AS "Free T4",
    MAX(s.value) FILTER (WHERE s.metric = 'Free T3') AS "Free T3",
    MAX(s.value) FILTER (WHERE s.metric = 'T4 Total') AS "T4 Total",
    MAX(s.value) FILTER (WHERE s.metric = 'T3 Total') AS "T3 Total"
FROM samples s
WHERE s.metric IN ('TSH', 'Free T4', 'Free T3', 'T4 Total', 'T3 Total')
  AND $__timeFilter(s.time)
  AND s.value IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY s.time
ORDER BY s.time

SELECT s.time,
    MAX(s.value) FILTER (WHERE s.metric = 'Troponin I') AS "Troponin I",
    MAX(s.value) FILTER (WHERE s.metric = 'CK') AS "CK",
    MAX(s.value) FILTER (WHERE s.metric = 'CK-MB') AS "CK-MB",
    MAX(s.value) FILTER (WHERE s.metric = 'BNP') AS "BNP"
FROM samples s
WHERE s.metric IN ('Troponin I', 'CK', 'CK-MB', 'BNP')
  AND $__timeFilter(s.time)
  AND s.value IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY s.time
ORDER BY s.time

SELECT s.time,
    MAX(s.value) FILTER (WHERE s.metric = 'Ferritin') AS "Ferritin",
    MAX(s.value) FILTER (WHERE s.metric = 'Iron') AS "Iron",
    MAX(s.value) FILTER (WHERE s.metric = 'TIBC') AS "TIBC",
    MAX(s.value) FILTER (WHERE s.metric = 'Transferrin Saturation') AS "Transferrin Saturation"
FROM samples s
WHERE s.metric IN ('Ferritin', 'Iron', 'TIBC', 'Transferrin Saturation')
  AND $__timeFilter(s.time)
  AND s.value IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY s.time
ORDER BY s.time

SELECT s.time,
    MAX(s.value) FILTER (WHERE s.metric = 'PT') AS "PT",
    MAX(s.value) FILTER (WHERE s.metric = 'PTT') AS "PTT",
    MAX(s.value) FILTER (WHERE s.metric = 'INR') AS "INR",
    MAX(s.value) FILTER (WHERE s.metric = 'Fibrinogen') AS "Fibrinogen"
FROM samples s
WHERE s.metric IN ('PT', 'PTT', 'INR', 'Fibrinogen')
  AND $__timeFilter(s.time)
  AND s.value IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY s.time
ORDER BY s.time

SELECT s.time,
    MAX(s.value) FILTER (WHERE s.metric = 'CRP') AS "CRP",
    MAX(s.value) FILTER (WHERE s.metric = 'hsCRP') AS "hsCRP",
    MAX(s.value) FILTER (WHERE s.metric = 'ESR') AS "ESR",
    MAX(s.value) FILTER (WHERE s.metric = 'IL-6') AS "IL-6"
FROM samples s
WHERE s.metric IN ('CRP', 'hsCRP', 'ESR', 'IL-6')
  AND $__timeFilter(s.time)
  AND s.value IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY s.time
ORDER BY s.time

SELECT s.time,
    MAX(s.value) FILTER (WHERE s.metric = 'Insulin') AS "Insulin",
    MAX(s.value) FILTER (WHERE s.metric = 'Cortisol') AS "Cortisol",
    MAX(s.value) FILTER (WHERE s.metric = 'ACTH') AS "ACTH"
FROM samples s
WHERE s.metric IN ('Insulin', 'Cortisol', 'ACTH')
  AND $__timeFilter(s.time)
  AND s.value IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY s.time
ORDER BY s.time

SELECT s.time,
    MAX(s.value) FILTER (WHERE s.metric = 'Vitamin D') AS "Vitamin D",
    MAX(s.value) FILTER (WHERE s.metric = 'Vitamin B12') AS "Vitamin B12",
    MAX(s.value) FILTER (WHERE s.metric = 'Folate') AS "Folate"
FROM samples s
WHERE s.metric IN ('Vitamin D', 'Vitamin B12', 'Folate')
  AND $__timeFilter(s.time)
  AND s.value IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY s.time
ORDER BY s.time

SELECT s.time,
    MAX(s.value) FILTER (WHERE s.metric = 'Hemoglobin A1c') AS "Hemoglobin A1c",
    MAX(s.value) FILTER (WHERE s.metric = 'LDH') AS "LDH",
    MAX(s.value) FILTER (WHERE s.metric = 'Magnesium') AS "Magnesium",
    MAX(s.value) FILTER (WHERE s.metric = 'Ionized Calcium') AS "Ionized Calcium",
    MAX(s.value) FILTER (WHERE s.metric = 'Uric Acid') AS "Uric Acid",
    MAX(s.value) FILTER (WHERE s.metric = 'Phosphorus') AS "Phosphorus",
    MAX(s.value) FILTER (WHERE s.metric = 'Lactate') AS "Lactate"
FROM samples s
WHERE s.metric IN ('Hemoglobin A1c', 'LDH', 'Magnesium', 'Ionized Calcium', 'Uric Acid', 'Phosphorus', 'Lactate')
  AND $__timeFilter(s.time)
  AND s.value IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY s.time
ORDER BY s.time

SELECT s.time,
    MAX(s.value) FILTER (WHERE s.metric = 'CD3 T Cells %') AS "CD3 T Cells %",
    MAX(s.value) FILTER (WHERE s.metric = 'CD3 T Cells Abs') AS "CD3 T Cells Abs",
    MAX(s.value) FILTER (WHERE s.metric = 'CD4 T Cells %') AS "CD4 T Cells %",
    MAX(s.value) FILTER (WHERE s.metric = 'CD4 T Cells Abs') AS "CD4 T Cells Abs",
    MAX(s.value) FILTER (WHERE s.metric = 'CD8 T Cells %') AS "CD8 T Cells %",
    MAX(s.value) FILTER (WHERE s.metric = 'CD8 T Cells Abs') AS "CD8 T Cells Abs",
    MAX(s.value) FILTER (WHERE s.metric = 'CD4/CD8 Ratio') AS "CD4/CD8 Ratio",
    MAX(s.value) FILTER (WHERE s.metric = 'CD19 B Cells %') AS "CD19 B Cells %",
    MAX(s.value) FILTER (WHERE s.metric = 'CD19 B Cells Abs') AS "CD19 B Cells Abs",
    MAX(s.value) FILTER (WHERE s.metric = 'CD16/CD56 NK Cells %') AS "CD16/CD56 NK Cells %"
FROM samples s
WHERE s.metric IN ('CD3 T Cells %', 'CD3 T Cells Abs', 'CD4 T Cells %', 'CD4 T Cells Abs', 'CD8 T Cells %', 'CD8 T Cells Abs', 'CD4/CD8 Ratio', 'CD19 B Cells %', 'CD19 B Cells Abs', 'CD16/CD56 NK Cells %')
  AND $__timeFilter(s.time)
  AND s.value IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY s.time
ORDER BY s.time

SELECT s.time,
    MAX(s.value) FILTER (WHERE s.metric = 'pH') AS "pH",
    MAX(s.value) FILTER (WHERE s.metric = 'PCO2') AS "PCO2",
    MAX(s.value) FILTER (WHERE s.metric = 'PO2') AS "PO2",
    MAX(s.value) FILTER (WHERE s.metric = 'Oxygen Saturation') AS "Oxygen Saturation",
    MAX(s.value) FILTER (WHERE s.metric = 'Base Excess') AS "Base Excess"
FROM samples s
WHERE s.metric IN ('pH', 'PCO2', 'PO2', 'Oxygen Saturation', 'Base Excess')
  AND $__timeFilter(s.time)
  AND s.value IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY s.time
ORDER BY s.time

SELECT s.time,
    MAX(s.value) FILTER (WHERE s.metric = 'BUN/Creatinine Ratio') AS "BUN/Creatinine Ratio",
    MAX(s.value) FILTER (WHERE s.metric = 'Glucose, Urine') AS "Glucose, Urine",
    MAX(s.value) FILTER (WHERE s.metric = 'Ketones, Urine') AS "Ketones, Urine",
    MAX(s.value) FILTER (WHERE s.metric = 'Specific Gravity, Urine') AS "Specific Gravity, Urine",
    MAX(s.value) FILTER (WHERE s.metric = 'Urine pH') AS "Urine pH",
    MAX(s.value) FILTER (WHERE s.metric = 'Reticulocyte Count') AS "Reticulocyte Count",
    MAX(s.value) FILTER (WHERE s.metric = 'Nucleated RBC') AS "Nucleated RBC",
    MAX(s.value) FILTER (WHERE s.metric = 'Mean Plasma Glucose') AS "Mean Plasma Glucose"
FROM samples s
WHERE s.metric IN ('BUN/Creatinine Ratio', 'Glucose, Urine', 'Ketones, Urine', 'Specific Gravity, Urine', 'Urine pH', 'Reticulocyte Count', 'Nucleated RBC', 'Mean Plasma Glucose')
  AND $__timeFilter(s.time)
  AND s.value IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY s.time
ORDER BY s.time

title: Lab Results Overview
